nodes.label: Read-Only Data and DMX Output Rule
nodes.norm_label: read-only data and dmx output rule

nodes.label: NumPy Shader Evaluation Decision
nodes.rationale: NumPy vectorization was chosen because per-frame 2D shader evaluation at 50 FPS is materially faster and more reliable than pure Python loops.

nodes.label: Hybrid Fixture Ownership Decision
nodes.rationale: Keep fixtures.json and pois.json canonical while stage_virtual_canvas.json stores only render-oriented derived metadata, avoiding duplicated DMX ownership.

nodes.label: Evaluator to DMX Boundary Decision
nodes.rationale: The evaluator should emit per-fixture render intents and leave channel packing to the DMX writer so rendering logic stays separate from fixture-template addressing.

nodes.label: Moving-Head POI Pan/Tilt Mapping
nodes.rationale: Uses target_poi lookups to translate moving-head render states into pan and tilt channel bytes.

nodes.label: Derived Canvas POIs
nodes.rationale: Falls back to canonical data/fixtures/pois.json coordinates when stage_virtual_canvas.json does not embed explicit POIs, so the debug SVG can still render target markers and aim lines.

nodes.label: Canvas Init Payload
nodes.rationale: Carries song metadata plus canvas dimensions and fixture positions needed before frame playback starts.

nodes.label: Canvas Frame Payload
nodes.rationale: Packages q_buffer values, per-fixture output, and the rendered canvas mesh into a single browser inspection frame.

nodes.label: Playback Inspection App
nodes.rationale: Presents the engine output through a canvas view, math-state panel, and waveform-driven playback controls.

nodes.label: Engine Canvas Component
nodes.rationale: Paints the emitted mesh as a cell grid and overlays fixture positions against the virtual stage dimensions.

nodes.label: Math Parameters Panel
nodes.rationale: Displays the current time, section metadata, band energies, and cue-driven math parameters from the engine state.

nodes.label: WaveSurfer Lifecycle Management
nodes.rationale: The component creates a WaveSurfer instance only after the container div exists and destroys it during cleanup so a single renderer stays bound to the DOM node.

nodes.label: Ready-Gated Playback Sync
nodes.rationale: Playback is started from the ready handler when a new audio URL has finished loading, which avoids issuing play before media initialization completes.

nodes.label: Canvas WebSocket Session
nodes.rationale: The hook derives the websocket endpoint from the current page protocol and hostname, then connects to the fixed canvas stream path on port 3301.

nodes.label: Engine Message Protocol
nodes.rationale: The hook treats ready, init, frame, and end messages as separate protocol events that update readiness, static metadata, live frame data, and terminal status.

nodes.label: Reconnect Strategy
nodes.rationale: Reconnect waits 1 second, avoids stacking multiple timers, and stops scheduling once the effect has been disposed.

nodes.label: Fixture State Merge
nodes.rationale: Frame updates are merged onto the existing fixture list so static fixture metadata from init remains available while dimmer and color fields refresh per frame.

nodes.label: Play Command Dispatch
nodes.rationale: The public sendPlay function only emits a play message when the websocket is open, otherwise it marks the session as disconnected.
